{{Quote|Move it, move it, move it! What the heck are you waiting for, Briggs? An engraved invitation? Get out there and kill some Rebels!|[[Sergeant major/Legends|Sergeant major]] [[Hong]] to Briggs, during the [[Battle of AX-456]]|<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire">''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''</ref>}}
'''Briggs''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], he served alongside [[Cadet Leader]] [[Kyle Katarn]]'s [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] in the assault on [[AX-456]]. While he hesitated to leave the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] transport vessel Briggs was immediately reprimanded by [[Sergeant major/Legends|Sergeant major]] [[Hong]] and later [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the ensuing [[Battle of AX-456|battle]].
